name: STARNET
description: STARNET is the OASIS OAPP registry and discovery layer. Every OAPP registered here gets a permanent UUID, appears in the Celestial Cyberspace galaxy, and can be cloned or downloaded by any developer or AI agent.

registered_oapps.name: AgentServiceMarketplaceTemplate
registered_oapps.summary: Holonic marketplace for AI agents and human service providers. Agents publish capability cards via the OASIS A2A protocol; clients post tasks; reputation tracked via karma and SERV/MNEE token payments.

registered_oapps.name: QuestBuilderTemplate
registered_oapps.summary: Build and publish quests with GPS hotspots, multi-stage missions, and NFT rewards. Leverages QuestManager, GeoHotSpotManager, MissionManager, and STARNFTManager.

registered_oapps.name: EscrowTimebankTemplate
registered_oapps.summary: Time-banking platform with escrow-protected service exchange. Hours of skilled service earn karma and time-credits. Integrates EscrowController, InvoiceController, TreasuryController, and KarmaController.

registered_oapps.name: GeoNFTHuntTemplate
registered_oapps.summary: AR/physical scavenger hunt. Players arrive at real-world GPS locations to unlock clues and mint unique GeoNFTs as proof-of-presence. Leverages STARGeoNFTManager and GeoHotSpotManager.

registered_oapps.name: ClanGuildTemplate
registered_oapps.summary: Holonic clan/guild management. NFT-gated membership; karma-weighted treasury governance; achievement badges minted on-chain. Integrates ClanController, KarmaController, WalletController.

registered_oapps.name: SovereignDataVaultTemplate
registered_oapps.summary: Self-sovereign personal data vault. Encrypted files backed across MongoDB, IPFS, Holochain, and Solana. Granular access grants audited on-chain. Integrates VaultController, FilesController, HyperDriveController.

registered_oapps.name: PortOSTemplate
registered_oapps.summary: Door-to-berth port intelligence OAPP for LFG/PAA multi-site deployments (Abidjan, San Pedro). 24 holons across 7 zomes covering port infrastructure, vessel calls, container shipments, inland movements, customs triage, hinterland ETAs, and operations. Feeds a System 08 / ACI Port OS dashboard with live KPIs across berth, gate, yard, customs, pre-gate, ESG, and revenue tiles.

registered_oapps.name: RWAPropertyTemplate
registered_oapps.summary: Real World Asset property OAPP. One canonical holon per property — moving identity across TMRW, Launchboard, marketplaces, and compliance systems. 6 zomes covering property identity (address, area, external IDs), valuations/yield/listings, Web4 tokenisation and cap table, lease and maintenance management, financing and disposition, and legal/insurance compliance with IPFS proof.

registered_oapps.name: BusinessEntityTemplate
registered_oapps.summary: Business entity OAPP — startup, fund, SPV, or DAO as a single moving identity across TMRW, Launchboard, and investor platforms. 5 zomes covering entity/legal registration, equity/share classes/cap table, funding rounds/valuation, team/operations/exit, and compliance/licences/dataroom. Web4 token bindings for tokenised equity.

registered_oapps.name: SocialGraphTemplate
registered_oapps.summary: Decentralised social layer OAPP. Avatar-native profiles, follow graph, posts/threads/reposts, reactions, DMs, group chat, shares, and notifications — without a centralised platform. 5 zomes: ProfileZome, ConnectionZome, FeedZome, ChatZome, ShareZome. Backed by SocialController, MessagingController, ChatController, ShareController.

registered_oapps.name: SubscriptionMembershipTemplate
registered_oapps.summary: Tier-based membership and subscription OAPP. Access gated by Karma score, token balance, NFT ownership, or recurring payment. Membership NFTs, benefit grants, access rules, and payment records. 4 zomes: TierZome, MemberZome, BenefitZome, PaymentZome.

registered_oapps.name: CompetitionTournamentTemplate
registered_oapps.summary: Structured competitions and tournaments OAPP. Single/double elimination, round robin, ladder formats. Bracket management, match results, live leaderboards, Egg challenges, NFT/token prize pools, and Karma rewards. 4 zomes: TournamentZome, BracketZome, LeaderboardZome, RewardZome.

registered_oapps.name: AgriTraceabilityTemplate
registered_oapps.summary: Farm-to-port-to-shelf agricultural traceability OAPP. Full chain-of-custody from geo-anchored plot through harvest batch, processing, inland transport, port handoff, and retail delivery. EUDR/organic/fair-trade certs stored with IPFS hash and on-chain proof NFT. Upstream layer for PortOSTemplate. 5 zomes: FarmZome, CropBatchZome, ChainOfCustodyZome, CertificateZome, RetailZome.

registered_oapps.name: ConservationImpactTemplate
registered_oapps.summary: Conservation and environmental impact OAPP for Pulmon Verde / IXO-style deployments. Geo-anchored projects, measurable impact metrics (time series), carbon credits (on-chain NFT, VCS/GoldStandard), field monitoring events, and transparent funder contributions. 5 zomes: ProjectZome, ImpactMetricZome, CarbonCreditZome, MonitoringZome, FunderZome.

registered_oapps.name: CreatorEconomyTemplate
registered_oapps.summary: Creator economy OAPP — music, video, art, writing, or any digital content. Content items and collections, on-chain royalty split rules (multi-recipient), licensing agreements, streaming/distribution records, and NFT drops. Backed by NftController, TokenController, FilesController, HyperDriveController. 4 zomes: ContentZome, RoyaltySplitZome, LicenseZome, StreamingZome.

registered_oapps.name: HospitalityEventsTemplate
registered_oapps.summary: Phygital hospitality and events OAPP designed for Alton Towers and similar real-world integrations. Venues, attractions, events, ticket tiers, NFT-backed tickets, geo check-ins, and loyalty karma accumulation. 4 zomes: VenueZome, EventZome, TicketNFTZome, ExperienceZome. Check-in is GeoHotSpot proof; loyalty accumulates on Avatar.

registered_oapps.name: SovereignHealthRecordTemplate
registered_oapps.summary: Sovereign personal health record OAPP. Patient-controlled medical history, provider credentials, prescriptions, test results, and granular per-record consent grants — all encrypted across MongoDB, IPFS, Holochain, and Solana. Extends SovereignDataVault for healthcare. PrivacyMage integration-ready. 5 zomes: PatientZome, ProviderZome, RecordZome, PrescriptionZome, ConsentZome.

api_response_shape.note: Fields returned by GET /api/OAPPs per item
api_response_shape.name: string
